SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class SubstOp

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.SubstOp
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named, Operator, SyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
WarySubstOp
public abstract class SubstOp extends AbstractOperator implements Operator
Standard first-order substitution operator, resolving clashes but not preventing (usually unsound) substitution of non-rigid terms across modal operators. Currently, only the subclass WarySubstOp is used and accessible through the key parser.

    checks whether the sort of the subterm 0 of the given term has the same sort as or a subsort of the variable to be substituted and the term's arity is 2 and the number of variables bound there is 0 for the 0th subterm and 1 for the 1st subterm.

  • Method Details

    • sort

      public Sort sort(Sort[] sorts)
      Specified by:
      sort in interface Operator
      Returns:
      sort of the second subterm or throws an IllegalArgumentException if the given term has no correct (2=) arity

    • validTopLevelException

      public <T extends Term> void validTopLevelException(T term) throws TermCreationException
      checks whether the sort of the subterm 0 of the given term has the same sort as or a subsort of the variable to be substituted and the term's arity is 2 and the number of variables bound there is 0 for the 0th subterm and 1 for the 1st subterm.
      Specified by:
      validTopLevelException in interface Operator
      Overrides:
      validTopLevelException in class AbstractOperator
      Throws:
      TermCreationException - if the check fails

    • apply

      public abstract JTerm apply(JTerm term, TermBuilder tb)
      Apply this substitution operator to term, which has this operator as top-level operator
      Parameters:
      term - the JTerm on which to apply the substitution
      tb - the TermBuilder to use for term construction
